title: IP Restriction Configuration
description: Configuration for the IP Restriction extension. Controls access based on IP allowlists or denylists. Exactly one of allow_addresses or deny_addresses must be provided.

allow_addresses.description: IP addresses or CIDR ranges to allow. When set, only requests from these addresses are permitted.

items.description: An IPv4/IPv6 address or CIDR range (e.g. "192.168.1.0/24", "::1", "10.0.0.1").

deny_addresses.description: IP addresses or CIDR ranges to deny. When set, requests from these addresses are blocked with 403 Forbidden.

items.description: An IPv4/IPv6 address or CIDR range (e.g. "192.168.1.50", "10.0.0.0/8").
